title: selaginella doederleinii subsp. scabrifolia
intro: Selaginella doederleinii subsp. scabrifolia, also known as the mountain spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella doederleinii subsp. scabrifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
